positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of intertwined celestial botanicals and bioluminescent fauna. The central subject is a stylized representation of a crescent moon cradling glowing, oversized flowers (ethereal lilies, moon petals) that sprout from swirling galaxies. Incorporate delicate, intricate linework, mandalic geometric patterns forming stardust trails, and silhouettes of stylized hummingbirds and moths. The color palette should be dominated by deep midnight blues, cosmic purples, emerald greens, and pops of glowing cyan and gold. Composition must be strictly central and contained, maximizing negative space for print clarity. Style: Neo-Art Deco fantasy illustration, woodcut quality blended with bioluminescence, high contrast, symmetrical, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, excessive grain, low detail, dirty, messy, amateur, cartoon, graffiti, poorly rendered hands, bad anatomy, extra limbs, blurry edges
